title: Iranian FM Araghchi calls EAM Jaishankar as Strait of Hormuz tensions mount
content:
Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi made a phone call to India's External Affairs Minister Jaishankar.
*   The communication took place amidst rising tensions in the strategically important Strait of Hormuz.
*   The call signifies diplomatic engagement between the two nations regarding the escalating regional situation.

title: Explosives with detonators found near Russian gas pipeline in Serbia, probe underway
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   Explosives and detonators have been discovered near a gas pipeline.
*   The pipeline is a Russian-owned facility located in Serbia.
*   An official investigation into the incident is currently underway.

title: Moody's cuts India's FY27 GDP growth estimates to 6% amid West Asia conflict
content:
Moody's has lowered its GDP growth estimates for India.
*   The revised projection for Fiscal Year 2027 (FY27) is now 6%.
*   This downgrade is attributed to the ongoing conflict in West Asia.

title: ISRO launches Mission MITRA in Ladakh for astronaut study: Inside the 3,500m experiment testing human survival in space-like conditions
content:
ISRO has launched "Mission MITRA" in Ladakh.
*   The mission involves an experiment conducted at an altitude of 3,500 meters.
*   It aims to test human survival in space-like conditions for astronaut study and training.

title: Over 26,000 children under sponsorship scheme unpaid for a year in Karnataka
content:
Over 26,000 children in Karnataka have not received their due payments.
*   These payments are part of a specific government sponsorship scheme.
*   The children have been unpaid for an entire year.

title: A debate on the tenure of Election Commission-appointed police chief
content:
A debate is taking place concerning the *tenure* (length of service) of a police chief.
*   This particular police chief was *appointed by the Election Commission*.
*   The discussion likely revolves around the implications or appropriateness of the Election Commission determining the duration of such an appointment.

title: Tamil Nadu missed out on Central government schemes because DMK saw BJP as an enemy, says G.K. Vasan
content:
Tamil Nadu has missed out on receiving benefits from Central government schemes.
*   This is attributed to the ruling DMK party viewing the BJP as an "enemy."
*   The claim was made by G.K. Vasan.
